# Size

**Data field**

An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the decompression parameters atom.

## Data fields

- **Type**: An unsigned 32-bit field.
- **Extension atoms**: Atoms containing the necessary out-of-band decompression parameters for the sound decompressor.

items.description: Atoms containing the necessary out-of-band decompression parameters for the sound decompressor.
